characters.name: Agent Smith
characters.description: Agent SmithBiographical InformationFull nameUnknownAgeUnknownGenderMaleResidesSooga IslandProfessional InformationOccupationSecret agentAffiliation(s)NeutralPhysical DescriptionHair colorBlackAppearances and VoicesFirst AppearanceThe Sooga Island Alien Agent Smith(스미쓰,Seumisseu) is a recurring character in Netflix'sPucca: Love Recipe. It's unknown where he came from or whom he exactly works for. Agent Smith appears inThe Sooga Island Alien, coming to Sooga Island to investigate reports of alien visitors. But he's not the brightest agent, as he's somewhat extremely paranoid and jumps to conclusions. He believes many of the average islands were aliens, though there is no proof. He immediately believesPuccawas one due to her special abilities and chasingGaru. After losing a fight to Pucca, he's shocked to findreal aliensthat were hiding in plain sight. Or more or less he was completely oblivious to the obvious.

characters.name: Amy
characters.description: AmyBiographical InformationAge11-12GenderFemalePhysical DescriptionHair colorBlondeEye colorBlackRelationshipsRomancesAyo(ex-boyfriend)Appearances and VoicesOnly AppearanceLove Bracelet Amyis a no show character inPucca: Love Recipeand is the ex-romance forAyo. Not much is known about her. The only information we have on her is that she still sends letters toAyobecause she "can't be over Ayo." However, Ayo states that he used a bracelet on her to make her love him. She is only mentioned in the episodeLove Bracelet. The only time you see her is on a picture she sent to Ayo from her letters. It isn't known if he wants to be back with her or not, for he never did say if he did.

characters.name: Australian Man
characters.description: Australian ManBiographical InformationFull nameUnknownGenderMaleResidesSomewhere near the Australian OutbackPhysical DescriptionHair colorBlondRelationshipsChildrenGaru(informally adopted son, formerly)Appearances and VoicesOnly AppearanceGaru Down Under The unnamedAustralian Manis the main antagonist inGaru Down Under. After Garu lands beside him, he instantly adopts him. He unknowingly poisons Garu by several things, not knowing the danger he continuously puts Garu in. He's most likely a combination of Australian stereotypes.

characters.name: Ayo
characters.description: AyoBiographical InformationAge12GenderMaleProfessional InformationOccupationAssistant toRing RingPhysical DescriptionHair colorBlackEye colorBlackRelationshipsRelativesFyah(uncle)FriendsRing Ring,Garu,Abyo,Ching,PuccaRomancesRing Ring(one time girlfriend)Appearances and VoicesFirst AppearanceThe Bodyguard ContestVoiced byBen Pronsky  Ayo(에이요,Eiyo) is the kind and overly honest nephew ofFyah. He appears in the Netflix showPucca: Love Recipe. He visits Sooga Island to spend his summer vacation with his uncle, much to his uncle's surprise and a bit annoyance. Ayo is somewhat neutral- he does whatRing Ringorders him to and assists in hers and Fyah's schemes, though he doesn't seem to take joy out of it.

characters.name: Baby Dragon
characters.description: Baby DragonBiographical InformationAgeYoungGenderMaleResidesSooga ForestOther InformationAbilitiesFlying and Flame breathPhysical DescriptionScale colorGreenEye colorBrownRelationshipsFriendsChing,Abyo,Pucca,AyoEnemiesRing RingAppearances and VoicesFirst AppearanceThe Dragon Tail This adorable baby dragon appears in Netflix'sPucca: Love Recipe. He becomes an instant friends toChing,Abyo, andPucca. The baby dragon appears in the final episode, "The Dragon Tail". WhenGarugets sick,the chefsrequest "dragon's tail" as an ingredient for a stew to cure him. Abyo, Ching, and Pucca accompanyDadaon this quest. The trio believe that the uncles meant a real dragon's tail and admit the conflict of causing it pain. Though Dada tries to correct them, they accidentally get separated before he can explain what "dragon's tail" is. He is very friendly and helpful to friends. A bit of a playful side to those who try to bother him likeRing Ring.
characters.personality_section: He is very friendly and helpful to friends. A bit of a playful side to those who try to bother him likeRing Ring.

characters.name: Baby New Year
characters.description: Baby New YearBiographical InformationBorn2006 or 2007AgeInfantGenderMaleSpeciesOwlResidesSooga VillageProfessional InformationOccupationStart the New YearAffiliation(s)GoodOther InformationAbilitiesCause old agePhysical DescriptionFeather colorBrownEye colorBlackRelationshipsRelativesFather Time(unspecified relation)The Goddess of Baby Deliveries(caregiver)FriendsPucca,Garu,Ching,Master SooEnemiesMujiAppearances and VoicesOnly AppearanceNo Year's EveVoiced byCaitlynne Medrek Baby New Yearis a newborn baby owl that replacesFather Timeevery New Year. Baby New Year is first seen in episode "No Year's Eve". He was due to be Father Time's replacement. The Goddess of Baby Deliveries was supposed to bring him toMaster Soo; however,Muji, hoping to prevent his aging, had the young owlet quickly kidnapped by hisXombies.

characters.name: Black Powder
characters.description: Black PowderBiographical InformationAgeUnknownGenderMaleProfessional InformationAffiliation(s)EvilPhysical DescriptionHair colorGrayEye colorBlackRelationshipsEnemiesRed LanternPeople of Sooga VillageAppearances and VoicesOnly AppearanceTis the Season for RevengeVoiced byDave Ward  Black Powderis an evil ninja who stole things from people along with his allyRed Lantern. His main weapon of choice was black powder. He comes toSooga Villageto get his revenge on Red Lantern, as he betrayed him. In the end, Red Lantern wins by sending Black Powder into the stomach of a whale. He stole all the presents in the village to make Red Lantern appear.

characters.name: Captain
characters.description: CaptainBiographical InformationAliasesDonamniGoldmanGenderMaleSpeciesAxolotlProfessional InformationOccupationPirate captain, thiefAffiliation(s)BadPhysical DescriptionHair colorBlackEye colorBlackRelationshipsFriendsBogoPunchMonkChingAbyoPuccaGaruDong King(possibly)EnemiesTobeFyahPucca(when they thought she came back to hurt them)Ring Ring(as a cow)Appearances and VoicesFirst AppearanceTreasure HuntLatest AppearanceRing Ring the CowVoiced byDave Ward Captainis the leader ofthe Piratesand a secondary antagonist in Pucca: Love Recipe. Captain has black hair with two fin-like frills, similar to an axolotl, and an eyepatch over his left eye. He is also an axolotl-like pirate, explaining how he has two whiskers or fins on each side of his head. He wears a long-sleeved jade green shirt, pants that are the same color as his shirt, and a golden belt. Captain is considered the most cunning compared to the group. Although his crew gets on his nerves. He does apparently value them, at least enough to remember their names.
characters.personality_section: Captain is considered the most cunning compared to the group. Although his crew gets on his nerves. He does apparently value them, at least enough to remember their names.

characters.name: Casano
characters.description: CasanoBiographical InformationResidesSooga IslandProfessional InformationOccupationHost/waiter and entertainer atDong King RestaurantPhysical DescriptionHair colorBlackEye colorBlackRelationshipsFriendsRing RingDong KingFyahEnemiesGaru(formerly)EdwardMija(ex-girlfriend)Appearances and VoicesFirst AppearanceThe Lucky CanLatest AppearanceDong King vs. Goh Rong Part 2Voiced bySpike Spencer Casano(카사노,Kasano) works forFyahand theDong King Restaurant. He's an underling of sorts to Fyah when it comes to ridding the restaurant's competition with theGoh-Rong. He is occasionally used byRing Ringfor her own plots. He does not seem threatened by Ring Ring like Fyah, but does considerDong KingandMijaas an obvious threat. Casano appeared in thefirst episodeofPucca: Love Recipewhere his main job seems to be promoting the Dong King restaurant or at least using his charm to lure in the female customers. Casano is seen as a bit vain, energetic, charismatic, endearing, dramatic, flirtatious and romantic guy. Despite this, Casano does participate in schemes to ruin Goh-Rong restaurant, taking his job at Dong King seriously. He got upset at the idea of him and Fyah being out of the job, though they misunderstood Ring Ring's words.

characters.name: Chang
characters.description: ChangJetixLove RecipeBiographical InformationNickname(s)Dad (ching)Age38GenderMaleSpeciesHumanResidesSooga VillageProfessional InformationOccupationTeacher at theTurtle Training HallAffiliation(s)Turtle Training HallPhysical DescriptionHair colorBlackEye colorBlackRelationshipsChildrenChing(daughter)FriendsTurtle(good friend),Bruce(best friend)Appearances and VoicesVoiced byMichael Daingerfield(Jetix series)Todd Haberkorn(English,Pucca: Love Recipe)Bruno Rocha/Jorge Lucas(Brazilian Portuguese)  Chang(창,Chang) isChing's father andBruce's friend. He runs a dojo, where he lives with his daughter and teaches Kung-Fu at. He does his best to teach his students the right way of martial arts and, more importantly, not to boast or show off.Abyo, one of his students, often fails at this. Chang is very friendly to everybody. As a teacher, he is also stern and wise when he gives guiding advice to his students. In the episodeMisplaced Face, Chang warns Abyo that he will "loose" face when he acts like a show off. This was taken literally in the series but, it is also a metaphor that some day you can shame yourself if you are too careless. This shows that he doesn't want his students to be on the wrong path and always wants them to do what's best for their self. Another example of this is in the episodeStar Stickers, where Abyo intentionally causes chaos and "fixes" them to make himself look better and more like a hero. When Abyo eventually confessed to what he did, Chang didn't reward him, but he did tell him he appreciated the honesty. This shows that as a master of the dojo, he is aware he needs to not always reward positive behavior and instead talk out with advice so his students can learn from their mistakes.

characters.name: Chef Alberto
characters.description: Chef AlbertoBiographical InformationFull nameAlbertoGenderMaleProfessional InformationOccupationChefPhysical DescriptionEye colorBlackRelationshipsFriendsHoDumplingLinguiniAppearances and VoicesFirst AppearanceNoodle Around The WorldLast AppearanceChef-Napped! Part 3 DumplingLinguini Chef Albertois a chef who makes the world's largest noodles, which filled the Roman Coliseum. According toLinguini, Alberto learned how to make them from him and his brothers.

characters.name: Chief
characters.description: ChiefBiographical InformationAge12GenderFemaleResidesSooga VillageProfessional InformationOccupationLeader of the Vagabond Ninja ClanPhysical DescriptionHair colorBlackEye colorBlackRelationshipsFriendsClown,ShamanRomancesTobe(crush and also possible husband)Appearances and VoicesFirst AppearanceNoodle Around The World(debut)Voiced byShannon Chan-Kent(English)Naomi Inoue (Japanese) Chief(칭칭,Jingjing) is a Kunoichi that is the leader ofVagabond Ninja Clan. She is very much in love withTobe, to the point of trying to help him in his revenge againstGaru. In one episode, she even wears glasses of Wise Turtle by accident, causing her to become intelligent. She tries to help and get Tobe's attention with her new wisdom, but in the end did not go as she wanted. It could be said that she is the wife of Tobe accidentally and they were married in the episodeEvil Love, though it is unknown if it is considered legal afterCupid'sarroweffects wore off. With her clumsy schemes, she can never be a respected criminal, especially because she is a crybaby.
characters.personality_section: With her clumsy schemes, she can never be a respected criminal, especially because she is a crybaby.

characters.name: Clown
characters.description: ClownBiographical InformationFull nameClown (Bing-Bing in games)Age14GenderMaleSpeciesReptilian/HumanResidesSooga VillageProfessional InformationOccupationMember of the Vagabond Ninja ClanPhysical DescriptionHair colorOrangeEye colorBlackRelationshipsFriendsShaman,ChiefAppearances and VoicesFirst AppearanceNoodle Around The WorldVoiced byBill Mondy(English)Kenji Nojima(Japanese)Manolo Rey(Brazilian Portuguese) Clownis a member of theVagabond Ninja Clan, acting as the group’s jester. Clown just wants to have fun and loves playing practical jokes, usually onChiefandShaman,  as they're his only friends. When he was 13 years old, he was kicked out of the circus for not being able to laugh (although inMisplaced Face, he was seen laughing atAbyoand inSoap Opera, he is seen laughing atRing Ring). He often has random twitches and muscle spasms and usually feebly wheezes when he tries to laugh.

characters.name: Cupid
characters.description: CupidBiographical InformationGenderMalePhysical DescriptionHair colorBlondeEye colorBlackAppearances and VoicesOnly AppearanceEvil Love Cupidis a character who makes an appearance in the episode "Evil Love." He arrives into theGoh-Rongafter a hard day at work, firing his love arrows, and sits down with the other holiday characters (Santaand theEaster Bunny) to complain about their jobs. An accident by theCat Clancauses his final arrow to accidentally strikeTobewho immediately falls in Love with Chief (who had actually been wondering how she could get his attention). After Tobe expresses these new feelings for theVagabondleader (and subsequently runs away in confusion),Puccaapproaches Cupid with a request to cast the same love spell onGaru. Cupid tells her he's sorry, but he has no other arrows to use. Pucca becomes enraged and, after grabbing him in anger, fires him across the room using his own bow.

characters.name: Cutter Rollstin
characters.description: Cutter RollstinBiographical InformationGenderMaleProfessional InformationOccupationMovie directorPhysical DescriptionHair colorBlackEye colorBlackAppearances and VoicesOnly AppearanceGone with the Noodles Cutter Rollstinis a character that appears in the episodeGone with the Noodles. In the episode, he is filming an action movie that starsAbyo,GaruandPucca. At the end, it is revealed to be a romantic comedy movie titled Funny love.

characters.name: Dada
characters.description: DadaJetixLove RecipeLove Recipe (2D)Biographical InformationGenderMaleResidesSooga VillageProfessional InformationOccupationBusboy at theGoh-Rong RestaurantProfessional wrestler (formerly)Affiliation(s)GoodPhysical DescriptionHair colorBlondeRelationshipsFriendsPucca,Garu,Abyo,Ching,Mister DishyEnemiesThe chefs(sometimes)Ring Ring(Pucca: Love Recipeonly)Appearances and VoicesFirst AppearanceFunny Love EruptionVoiced byLee Tockar(Jetix series)Todd Haberkorn(English,Pucca: Love Recipe) Dada(다다,Dada) is a luckless, clumsy 14 year old dishwasher and waiter at theGoh-Rong Restaurant. He is nervous and high-strung, which frequently leads to accidents around the kitchen. He is nervous and high-strung, which frequently leads to accidents around the kitchen.
